mano_cua.result_summary: 系统设置为Imperial(英制)单位，但Log Fuel Refill表单中Fuel Amount字段placeholder显示'Fuel Amount (Litres)'(公制)，应为'Fuel Amount (Gallons)'(英制)。Odometer字段也缺少单位提示(应显示miles)。单位设置未正确应用到燃油记录表单。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Screenshot confirms Fuel Amount field shows 'Fuel Amount (Litres)' in metric despite Imperial unit setting. Should show 'Fuel Amount (Gallons)'.
